message:
fix: remove dead code in molecule and cmd/up (gt-7nogk, gt-6khuy)

Remove GetCurrentStepBackoff (stub, never called),
getGitRootForMolStatus (unused), unused workDir param from
handleStepContinue, and startRigAgentsParallel (never called outside
its own test). Clean up orphaned os/exec import and test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
